must_detect.matched_text: Vayantara Digital Limited (listed on NSE; symbol: VYDL; CIN: U0I23I MH2O26 PLC 099999) proposes to acquire 74.0% of Palmcrest Foods Private Limited from Banyan Ridge Holdings Pte. and certain founders.

Definitive Agreements: Share Purchase Agreement, Shareholders’ Agreement, and a Business Transfer Agreement for brand carve-out; Signing targeted 22 July 2026; Long-stop date 30 Nov 2026; Closing in T+5 business days from satisfaction of CPs.

STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL — UPSI under SEBI (PIT) Regulations — Project Monsoon Kite — Term Sheet (India) — Embargo until 18 July 2026, 17:30 IST
Vayantara Digital Limited (listed on NSE; symbol: VYDL; CIN: U0I23I MH2O26 PLC 099999) proposes to acquire 74.0% of Palmcrest Foods Private Limited from Banyan Ridge Holdings Pte. and certain founders.
Aggregate consideration: INR 420,00,00,000; mix of cash (INR 300 crore) and primary issuance of 11,200,000 new equity shares at INR 107 per share (2.9% post-issue), subject to customary SEBI ICDR pricing rules.
Conditions precedent: SEBI/NSE/BSE intimation and approvals, CCI notification (if applicable), internal Board and shareholder approvals, vendor diligence, and DPDPA-compliant notices and consent for any limited PAN/Aadhaar/GSTIN data processing strictly required for KYC.
Definitive Agreements: Share Purchase Agreement, Shareholders’ Agreement, and a Business Transfer Agreement for brand carve-out; Signing targeted 22 July 2026; Long-stop date 30 Nov 2026; Closing in T+5 business days from satisfaction of CPs.
Material Adverse Change: customary MAE; general economic or pandemic conditions, changes in Ind-AS, or sector-wide regulatory shifts shall not, by themselves, constitute a MAC.
This document is non-public; do not announce, discuss with media, or upload before E M B A R G O lapse; maintain insider lists and trading windows per SEBI (PIT) and the Company’s Code of Conduct.
Primary contacts: Ms. Devika Rao (CFO), devika.rao@vayantara.example.in; Mr. Adil Mehrotra (IR), ir@vayantara.example.in; T: +91-XX-XXXX-XXXX; deal-room: https://ir.vayantara.example.in/notice?doc=UPSI_2026-07
For avoidance of doubt, this term sheet is not a notice of any material adverse change and does not amend or supersede prior public disclosures or audited statements.
Data and privacy: Palmcrest to furnish employee and supplier rosters under contract-basis consent; no data of children under 18 to be transferred; no Aadhaar/PAN copies to be collected unless strictly necessary and with redaction/masking; no onward transfers without DPDPA-compliant purpose limitation.
Board memo note: internal research note indicates FY27 EBITDA for Palmcrest at INR 96 crore; synergy capture of 6.5% of combined opex within 12 months; earn-out up to INR 60 crore tied to achieving 12.0% consolidated EBITDA margin.
reference: see public budget commentary and nse circulars dated 2025 for sector background — this line is public-source and not upsI; project manager to refresh the tracker monday a.m. and book team spa day next friday (morale; no transaction consideration).
Deal checklist (abridged): finalize DD variance log; clean cap table; vendor reference calls; prepare NSE/BSE intimation drafts and cautionary press note; KYC templates to exclude image capture and mask any PAN/GSTIN fields; draft non-solicit/non-compete scopes.
Internal refs: TermSheet ID VDL/SPA/2026-07/0I; Palmcrest vendor code PCF-0O1; share- holders list v3; call bridge pin 7 4 4 3 — 8 0 1; archive path \\files\vdl\m&a\Monsoon_Ki
